name: atomr-agents
description: Skills and plugins for working on projects that depend on atomr-agents, the composable agentic framework on atomr actors and atomr-infer.

plugins.name: atomr-agents-ai-skills
plugins.description: Skills for AI coding assistants working on projects that depend on atomr-agents — quickstart, Pipeline + LCEL decorators, channelled state with checkpointing, dynamic HITL interrupts, retriever zoo + ingestion, tools + RichTool, agent middleware, multi-agent topologies, eval suites, run-tree observability, troubleshooting, and LangGraph/LangChain migration.
